images.requiredBeforeDeployment: bbb signed decision, immutable production registry digest/signature, Redis competition, restart and rebuild regression

images.compatibilityBoundary: same PostgreSQL 16 major line with base image refresh
images.requiredBeforeDeployment: backup/restore, migration 001-011, transaction outbox and CAS regression

images.compatibilityBoundary: same PostgreSQL 16 major line but changes the base distribution from Debian to Alpine

images.compatibilityBoundary: cross-minor candidate because no newer 2.4 release is available

boundaries: Pulling and scanning these images does not authorize a runtime switch.
Candidate evidence cannot replace current-image evidence until deployment and full regression are approved.
No vulnerability exception may be inferred from a lower candidate count.
